# Bioinformatics Review Pre-Synthesis

Generated by `goyoke-team-prepare-synthesis`. This document provides programmatic interaction detection results for the staff-bioinformatician.

---

## Programmatic Cross-Domain Interaction Detection

> Generated by goyoke-team-prepare-synthesis using interaction-rules.json v1.0.0.
> 10 rules evaluated against 11 findings from 4 reviewers.
> 4 interactions detected, 4 findings unmatched.

### Detected Interactions

#### CRITICAL: fdr-chain-inflation (multiplicative)

**Rule:** FDR Chain Inflation from Custom Database

| Source | Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| A | proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-db-search-inflation | warning | Search database 3.2x reference proteome — FDR impact unaddressed |
| B | proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-fdr-global-only | warning | Only PSM-level FDR applied — protein-level FDR absent |

**Interaction:** Database inflation (proteogenomics-db-search-inflation from proteogenomics-reviewer) combined with proteomics-fdr-global-only from proteomics-reviewer — actual variant-class FDR may be 3-5x nominal. See Nesvizhskii 2014 framework for class-specific FDR.
**Algebra:** multiplicative — upstream finding multiplies downstream impact
**Staff-bioinformatician action:** VERIFY this interaction.

---

#### WARNING: spectral-quality-gates-identification (gating)

**Rule:** Spectral Quality Gating Identification Chain

| Source | Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| A | mass-spec-reviewer | mass-spec-spectral-quality | critical | Spectral quality critically degraded — 42% of spectra below S/N threshold |
| B | proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-fdr-global-only | warning | Only PSM-level FDR applied — protein-level FDR absent |

**Interaction:** Spectral quality concern (mass-spec-spectral-quality) may invalidate proteomics identification findings. Verify spectral quality before trusting identification results.
**Algebra:** gating — upstream finding invalidates downstream findings
**Staff-bioinformatician action:** VERIFY this interaction.

---

#### CRITICAL: variant-normalization-cascade (additive)

**Rule:** Missing Variant Normalization Cascading Through Pipeline

| Source | Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| A | genomics-reviewer | genomics-vc-no-normalization | critical | Variant normalization absent before VEP annotation |
| B | proteogenomics-reviewer | proteogenomics-fasta-dedup-missing | warning | Identical protein sequences not deduplicated before database export |

**Interaction:** Missing variant normalization (genomics-reviewer) causes duplicate protein entries (proteogenomics-reviewer), inflating search database. Root cause is upstream, not in protein generation.
**Algebra:** additive — findings compound — combined severity exceeds either alone
**Staff-bioinformatician action:** VERIFY this interaction.

---

#### WARNING: mbr-no-spectral-in-diffex (additive)

**Rule:** MBR Proteins in Differential Expression

| Source | Reviewer | Sharp Edge | Severity | Finding |
|--------|----------|-----------|----------|---------|
| A | proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-mbr-no-fdr | warning | Match-Between-Runs enabled without FDR control for transferred identifications |
| B | proteomics-reviewer | proteomics-stats-no-correction | warning | No multiple testing correction applied in differential expression analysis |

**Interaction:** MBR-transferred identifications (proteomics-mbr-no-fdr) feeding into statistical testing. MBR-only proteins have no spectral evidence — differential expression results for these proteins are unreliable.
**Algebra:** additive — findings compound — combined severity exceeds either alone
**Staff-bioinformatician action:** VERIFY this interaction.
